title: DCDServBack
description: DCDServback or in other words, Decrafted Server Backpacks is an updated fork of Servback by Octal-makes-code for 1.19 which adds server-sided backpacks, intended to be used for vanilla servers or servers utilizing PolyMC.
body:
DCDServback is an updated fork of Servback by Octal-makes-code introducing support for some new features while adding new content.
Intended to be used for vanilla servers and servers running Polymer / PolyMC. This was updated mostly for our upcoming server so if some stuff seems unnecessary for your own use then it probably is.

**Dependencies**:
Nbt Crafting

- Polymer Resource Pack support with hand-made textures by me
- New recipes with forced progression
- More annoying ways to craft a backpack!
- Advancements
- Unique Backpack
- Replaced Bundle with Totem of Undying (don't worry it just looks like one), reason for this was pretty simple. If you put something into bundle by mistake, that item was gone forever.

This mod adds following content:
- Cookie Backpack (9 slots)
- Truffle Backpack (18 slots)
- Pancake Backpack (27 slots)
- Pierogi Backpack (36 slots)
- Strawberry Pierogi Backpack (45 slots)
- Public Backpack (27 slots, shared with entire server)
- Ender Backpack (27 slots)
- Chocolate, Dough, Cottage Cheese, Sour Cream Upgrade Augments
